title: Player skull
description: Players who are killed by lightning coolies will lose their heads.
body:
## What is this?
It can realize that when the player is killed by lightning coolies, the player's head will fall. 
This is a data packet.

## installation guide
1. Select the world where the software package needs to be installed, click Edit, and then click Open World Folder.
2. Open the folder named package and put the package in it.
3. If the world has opened and you have started cheating, please type /reload the load package.
